taxonomy: Exodeconus integrifolius is classified as a species within the genus Exodeconus, which belongs to the family Muricidae. This family is a group of medium-sized to large predatory sea snails. The family Muricidae is part of the order Neogastropoda, which is a large group of snails and slugs. The order Neogastropoda is further classified within the class Gastropoda, which includes all types of snails and slugs. The class Gastropoda is part of the phylum Mollusca, which includes all mollusks, such as squid, clams, and snails.
